title: Fragrant Portuguese Potatoe Buns
description: Floral and silky potatoe buns with a touch of dairy-free milk for the perfect brunch dish.
instructions: Peel and boil the potatoes until they are soft, then mash them with a fork.
In a large bowl, combine mashed potatoes, flour, yeast, milk, baking powder, salt, vegetable oil, and extracts. Mix well to form a dough.
Let the mixture rest for 10 minutes before kneading thoroughly by hand or using a stand mixer until smooth and elastic.
Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Divide the dough into balls of about 4-ounce each, then shape them gently into buns.
Place the buns on a greased baking sheet. Cover with a damp cloth and let rise for about 30 minutes until doubled in size.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm as a delightful breakfast treat.
